notes: Original bundle included duplicate unitId 6603 due dwarf-6603 copy.json.
Individual JSON files in zip were UTF-16; this cleaned bundle is UTF-8.

notes.warning: Raw emotional moods, not yet interpreted as prose.

notes.deeplyUnmetThreshold: focusLevel below -999 is represented by personality flag has_unmet_needs
notes.focusLevel: goes toward 400 when satisfied; below 0 means unmet pressure
notes.needLevel: raw severity/decay pressure, not the current satisfaction level

notes.warning: Preference var fields are raw ids and are not resolved to material/creature/item names in this probe.

notes.extremeTraits: traits whose raw value differs from neutral 50 by at least 10
notes.strongNeeds: needs with needLevel >= 2 or currently unmet focusLevel
notes.strongValues: values sorted by absolute strength; polarity is raw sign, not yet interpreted as approve/disapprove prose
